---
title: "Script Article Rouget"
author: "CS"
date: "2024-08-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
	echo = TRUE,
	fig.align = "center",
	message = FALSE,
	warning = FALSE
)
```

# Introduction

Data on the stereological readings of the the red-mullet (Mullus surmuletus), as well as the macroscopic parameters of each sampled individual.

Script is seperated into different parts following the article. Datasets used here are **Stereo_MULL** and **Macro_MULL** from the Zenodo repositories (https://zenodo.org/records/8060356 and https://zenodo.org/records/8060309)

I. Inter-agent calibration (l.73-77): *ASK FOR Script_dif_3_agents.Rmd!* three to four agents read the same 15 histological slides. The goal of this exercise was to show the differences between readings from different operators (percentage agreement) with different degrees of knowledge on histological ovarian structures.

II. Cellular homogeneity check: both ovaries of 15 fish were sectioned in the anterior, posterior and median positions. Cellular counts were analysed and compared for two stocks : Bay of Biscay (l.1282-2438) and English Channel (l.78-1281).

III. Stereology results : using the stereological reading results to classify individuals into a maturity phase. Comparing the stereology results with the visual method results (Confusion matrix : l.2659-2668). Analysis of L50, A50, cellular structures in time for both stocks : Bay of Biscay (l.2669-2757) and English Channel (l.2758-2844)

IV. Hierarchical clustering (l.2846-3098): identify potential future spawners, form a new group and re-establish a L50, A50, GSI and review the cellular structure distributions


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(BiocManager)
library(RBioFormats)
library(rJava)
library(EBImage)
library(xml2)
library(magick)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(plyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(irr)
library(rpart)
library(ade4)
library(factoextra)
library(tidyr)
library(forcats)
library(readxl)
library(gt)
library(export)
library(ggrepel)
library(stringr)
library(sizeMat)

```

```{r data1}

setwd('C:/Users/csauger/Documents/These/Documents_et_Protocoles/Rouget/Article Rouget Barbet')

#Dataset with biological parameters (**Macro_MULL**) from Bay of Biscay
Macro_BB <- read_excel("../Article Rouget Barbet/Macro_MULL_BB.xlsx")
Macro_BB$Total_fish_length <- as.numeric(Macro_BB$Total_fish_length)

#Dataset with biological parameters (**Macro_MULL**) from English Channel
Macro_EC <- read_excel("../Article Rouget Barbet/Macro_MULL_EC.xlsx")

#Dataset with Stereology readings (**Stereo_MULL**) from Bay of Biscay
Stereo_BB <- read.csv("../Article Rouget Barbet/Stereo_MULL_BB.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ';', as.is = T)

#Dataset with Stereology readings (**Stereo_MULL**) from English Channel
Stereo_EC <- read.csv("../Article Rouget Barbet/Stereo_MULL_EC.csv", header = TRUE, sep = ';', as.is = T)

```

# I. Inter-agent calibration

All analysys and results are in the R Script : Script_dif_3_agents.Rmd
They use the data from the *Calibration* dataset folder found in either Zenodo repositories (https://zenodo.org/records/8060356 or https://zenodo.org/records/8060309)

# II. Cellular homogeneity check: English Channel

We set up the reading data into a more organized dataframe for further analysis

```{r data2, results='hide',message=FALSE}

Stereo_EC <- Stereo_EC %>% mutate(Fish_ID=((substr(slideid,1,12))))

Stereo_EC1 <- Stereo_EC %>% filter(reading == 'Homogénéité') %>% group_by(typecell, slideid) %>% summarise(hit_points= n())
Stereo_EC2 <- Stereo_EC1 %>% spread(key = "typecell", value = hit_points)
Stereo_EC2[is.na(Stereo_EC2)] <- 0

# Computation of each cellular type count (%)
Stereo_EC3 <- (Stereo_EC2[,2:13]*100)/(rowSums(Stereo_EC2[,2:13]))
Stereo_EC3 <- cbind(Stereo_EC3, Stereo_EC2$slideid)%>% rename(slideid = `Stereo_EC2$slideid`)
Stereo_EC4 <- Stereo_EC3 %>% pivot_longer(cols=1:12, names_to = "typecell", values_to = "vol_fract_estim")

```

## MULL_SUR_154 

```{r data3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_1 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_154"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_EC_1_G <- intra_id_EC_1 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_154"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_EC_EC_1_D <- intra_id_EC_1 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_154"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 1 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot1, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_1, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog1, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_1 <- intra_id_EC_1 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_1 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_155 

```{r data4, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_2 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_155"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_2_G <- intra_id_EC_2 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_155"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_EC_2_D <- intra_id_EC_2 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_155"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 2 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot2, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_2, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog2, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_2 <- intra_id_EC_2 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_2 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_156 

```{r data5, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_3 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_156"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_3_G <- intra_id_EC_3 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_156"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_EC_3_D <- intra_id_EC_3 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_156"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 3 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot3, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_3, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog3, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_3 <- intra_id_EC_3 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_3 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_157 

```{r data6, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_4 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_157"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_4_G <- intra_id_EC_4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_157"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_EC_4_D <- intra_id_EC_4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_157"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 4 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot4, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_4, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog4, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_4 <- intra_id_EC_4 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_4 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_180 

```{r data7, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_6 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_180"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_6_G <- intra_id_EC_6 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_180"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_EC_6_D <- intra_id_EC_6 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_180"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 5 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot5, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_6, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog6, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_6 <- intra_id_EC_6 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_6 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

```{r data8, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
# Ventral gonad
```

```{r plot6, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog7, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_7 <- intra_id_EC_7 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_7 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_160 

```{r data9, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_8 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_160"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_8_G <- intra_id_EC_8 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_160"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad

```

### Plot 7 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot7, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
```

```{r homog8, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
intradiff_id_EC_8 <- intra_id_EC_8 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_8 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

```{r data10, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
# Ventral gonad

```

### Plot 8 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot8, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_9, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog9, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_9 <- intra_id_EC_9 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_9 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_162 

```{r data11, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_10 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_162"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_10_G <- intra_id_EC_10 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_162"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_EC_10_D <- intra_id_EC_10 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_162"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 9 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot9, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_10, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog10, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_10 <- intra_id_EC_10 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_10 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_163 

```{r data12, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_11 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_163"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_11_G <- intra_id_EC_11 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_163"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

intra_id_EC_11_D <- intra_id_EC_11 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_163"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 10 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot10, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog11, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_11 <- intra_id_EC_11 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_11 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_164 

```{r data13, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_12 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_164"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_12_G <- intra_id_EC_12 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_164"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_EC_12_D <- intra_id_EC_12 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_164"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 11 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot11, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_12, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog12, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_12 <- intra_id_EC_12 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_12 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_165 

```{r data14, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_13 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_165"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_13_G <- intra_id_EC_13 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_165"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_EC_13_D <- intra_id_EC_13 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_165"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 12 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot12, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_13, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog13, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_13 <- intra_id_EC_13 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_13 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_167 

```{r data15, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_14 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_167"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_14_G <- intra_id_EC_14 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_167"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_EC_14_D <- intra_id_EC_14 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_167"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 13 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot13, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_14, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog14, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_14 <- intra_id_EC_14 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_14 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_168 

```{r data16, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_15 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_168"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_15_G <- intra_id_EC_15 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_168"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_EC_15_D <- intra_id_EC_15 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_168"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 14 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot14, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_15, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog15, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_15 <- intra_id_EC_15 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_15 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_169 

```{r data17, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_16 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_169"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_16_G <- intra_id_EC_16 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_169"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_EC_16_D <- intra_id_EC_16 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_169"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 15 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot15, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_16, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog16, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_16 <- intra_id_EC_16 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_16 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_175 

```{r data18, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_EC_17 <- Stereo_EC4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_175"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_EC_17_G <- intra_id_EC_17 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_175"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_EC_17_D <- intra_id_EC_17 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_175"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 16 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot16, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_EC_17, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog17, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_EC_17 <- intra_id_EC_17 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_EC_17 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

Setting up the data for a GLM and an ACP.

The dataframe contains : the reference ID of each individuals (**Fish_ID**), the histological slide's full name (**slideid**), each cellular type studied in this GLM (**typecell**), the position of the cross section (**position** = **D1**, **D2**, **D3**, **G1**, **G2** or **G3**), the number of times each structure was counted (**hit_points**), and the total number of sampling points for each slide (**nbrtot**).

```{r data19, echo=TRUE, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

Stereo_EC5 <- Stereo_EC1 %>% spread(key = "slideid", value = hit_points) 
Stereo_EC6 <- Stereo_EC5 %>% pivot_longer(cols=2:97, names_to = "slideid", values_to = "hit_points")
Stereo_EC6[is.na(Stereo_EC6)] <- 0
Stereo_EC7 <- Stereo_EC6 %>% mutate(position=((substr(slideid,14,15))))
Stereo_EC9 <- Stereo_EC7 %>% mutate(Fish_ID=((substr(slideid,1,12))))

Stereo_EC8 <- Stereo_EC %>% filter(reading == 'Homogénéité') %>% mutate(position=((substr(slideid,14,15))))

```

## GLM

To test whether there is a difference, or not, between  the 6 sections for one individual, we'll be using a General Linear Model (GLM). The response variable will be the number of times a structure was counted on each slide / the total number of structures counted per slide. This variable will be in percentage, so a binomial GLM will be used.

### og

```{r og1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_EC9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "og"))

```

Adding a column that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r og2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r og3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r og4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### po1

```{r po11, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_EC9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "po1"))

```

Adding a column that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r po12, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r po13, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r po14, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### po2

```{r po21, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_EC9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "po2"))

```

Adding a column that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r po22, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r po23, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r po24, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### ldo

```{r ldo1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_EC9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "ldo"))

```

Adding a column that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r ldo2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r ldo3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r ldo4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### aoA

```{r aoA1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_EC9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "aoA"))

```

Adding a column that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r aoA2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r aoA3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r aoA4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### bv

```{r bv1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_EC9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "bv"))

```

Adding a column that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r bv2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r bv3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r bv4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### ct

```{r ct1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_EC9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "ct"))

```

Adding a column that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r ct2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r ct3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r ct4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### E

```{r E1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_EC9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "E"))

```

Adding a column that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r E2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r E3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r E4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### gw

```{r gw1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_EC9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "gw"))

```

Adding a column that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r gw2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r gw3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r gw4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### Is

```{r Is1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_EC9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "Is"))

```

Adding a column that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r Is2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r Is3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r Is4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### L

```{r L1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_EC9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "L"))

```

Adding a column that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r L2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r L3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r L4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### U

```{r U1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_EC9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "U"))

```

Adding a column that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r U2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r U3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r U4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

## ACP

There doesn't seem to be differences between the 96 slides. 98.5% of the variation can be explained on 2 axis.

```{r acp1, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

acpmull<-Stereo_EC8%>%group_by(slideid,position,typecell)%>%summarise(n=n())%>%group_by(slideid,position)%>%mutate(tot=sum(n))%>%ungroup()%>%mutate(nperc=n/tot)

datacp<-acpmull%>%transmute(slideid,position,typecell,n=nperc)%>%tidyr::spread(typecell,n,fill=0)
dudi1  <-  dudi.pca(datacp%>%select(-slideid,-position),  scale  =  F, center  =F, scan  =  FALSE,  nf  =  6)

```

```{r acp2, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

fviz_pca_var(dudi1,labelsize=6, repel=T,col.var = "blue",arrowsize = 1) +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face  = 'bold'))+
  labs(title = "")

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=12, height=6)

```

ACP positions

```{r acp3, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

plot(dudi1$l1[,1:2],col=alpha(c("red","gold2","forestgreen","cyan3","blue","#FF00FFFF")[as.numeric(as.factor(datacp$position))],0.6), pch = 16, cex = 2, cex.lab = 1.5, cex.axis = 1.5, xlab="", ylab= "", theme=theme_bw())
s.class(dudi1$l1,fac=as.factor(datacp$position),add.plot=T,col=c("red","gold2","forestgreen","cyan3","blue","#FF00FFFF"),clabel = 2)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=12, height=6)

```

# II. Cellular homogeneity check: Bay of Biscay

We set up the reading data into a more organized dataframe for further analysis

```{r data20, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

Stereo_BB <- Stereo_BB %>% mutate(Fish_ID=((substr(slideid,1,12))))

Stereo_BB1 <- Stereo_BB %>% filter(reading == 'Homogénéité') %>% group_by(typecell, slideid) %>% summarise(hit_points= n())
Stereo_BB2 <- Stereo_BB1 %>% spread(key = "typecell", value = hit_points)
Stereo_BB2[is.na(Stereo_BB2)] <- 0

# Computation of each cellular type count (%)
Stereo_BB3 <- (Stereo_BB2[,2:14]*100)/(rowSums(Stereo_BB2[,2:14]))
Stereo_BB3 <- cbind(Stereo_BB3, Stereo_BB2$slideid)%>% rename(slideid = `Stereo_BB2$slideid`)
Stereo_BB4 <- Stereo_BB3 %>% pivot_longer(cols=1:13, names_to = "typecell", values_to = "vol_fract_estim")

```

## MULL_SUR_290 

```{r data21, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_5 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_290"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_5_G <- intra_id_BB_5 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_290"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_5_D <- intra_id_BB_5 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_290"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 17 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot17, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_5, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog5, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_5 <- intra_id_BB_5 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_5 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_291 

```{r data22, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_18 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_291"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_18_G <- intra_id_BB_18 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_291"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_18_D <- intra_id_BB_18 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_291"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 18 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot18, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_18, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog18, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_18 <- intra_id_BB_18 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_18 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_292 

```{r data23, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_19 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_292"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_19_G <- intra_id_BB_19 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_292"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_19_D <- intra_id_BB_19 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_292"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 19 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot19, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_19, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog19, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_19 <- intra_id_BB_19 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_19 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_293 

```{r data24, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_20 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_293"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_20_G <- intra_id_BB_20 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_293"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_20_D <- intra_id_BB_20 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_293"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 20 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot20, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_20, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog20, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_20 <- intra_id_BB_20 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_20 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_294 

```{r data25, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_21 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_294"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_21_G <- intra_id_BB_21 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_294"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_21_D <- intra_id_BB_21 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_294"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 21 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot21, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_21, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog21, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_21 <- intra_id_BB_21 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_21 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```
## MULL_SUR_295 

```{r data26, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_22 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_295"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_22_G <- intra_id_BB_22 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_295"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_22_D <- intra_id_BB_22 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_295"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 22 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot22, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_22, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog22, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_22 <- intra_id_BB_22 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_22 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_296 

```{r data27, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_23 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_296"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_23_G <- intra_id_BB_23 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_296"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_23_D <- intra_id_BB_23 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_296"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot23 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot23, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_23, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog23, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_23 <- intra_id_BB_23 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_23 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_297 

```{r data28, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_24 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_297"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_24_G <- intra_id_BB_24 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_297"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_24_D <- intra_id_BB_24 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_297"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 24 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot24, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_24, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog24, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_24 <- intra_id_BB_24 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_24 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_298 

```{r data29, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_25 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_298"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_25_G <- intra_id_BB_25 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_298"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_25_D <- intra_id_BB_25 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_298"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 25 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot25, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_25, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog25, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_25 <- intra_id_BB_25 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_25 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_300 

```{r data30, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_26 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_300"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_26_G <- intra_id_BB_26 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_300"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_26_D <- intra_id_BB_26 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_300"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 26 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot26, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_26, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog26, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_26 <- intra_id_BB_26 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_26 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

```{r data31, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
intra_id_BB_27 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_301"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_27_G <- intra_id_BB_27 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_301"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad

```

### Plot 27 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot27, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog27, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_27 <- intra_id_BB_27 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_27 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```
