```{r data32, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_28 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_302"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_28_G <- intra_id_BB_28 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_302"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_28_D <- intra_id_BB_28 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_302"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 28 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot28, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_28, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog28, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_28 <- intra_id_BB_28 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_28 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_303 

```{r data33, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_29 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_303"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_29_G <- intra_id_BB_29 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_303"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_29_D <- intra_id_BB_29 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_303"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 29 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot29, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_29, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog29, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_29 <- intra_id_BB_29 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_29 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```

## MULL_SUR_304 

```{r data34, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

intra_id_BB_30 <- Stereo_BB4 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_304"))

# Ventral gonad
intra_id_BB_30_G <- intra_id_BB_30 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_304"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "G"))

# Dorsal gonad
intra_id_BB_30_D <- intra_id_BB_30 %>% filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "MULL_SUR_304"))%>%filter(stringr::str_detect(slideid, "D"))

```

### Plot 30 : Surface (%) of different structures for 6 sections of a single fish

```{r plot30, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

ggplot(data = intra_id_BB_30, aes(x=typecell, y=vol_fract_estim, fill=slideid)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity",  position=position_dodge()) +
  xlab("Structures") +
  facet_wrap(~slideid) +
  ylab("Surface (%)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size=6))

```

We compute the readings to see the surface (%) difference between the 6 sections

```{r homog30, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

intradiff_id_BB_30 <- intra_id_BB_30 %>% group_by(typecell)%>%
  summarise(minsurf= min(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            maxsurf= max(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            diffperc=maxsurf-minsurf,
            sdperc=sd(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T),
            meanperc=mean(vol_fract_estim,na.rm=T))

intradiff_id_BB_30 %>% filter(diffperc > 3)

```


Setting up the data for a GLM and an ACP.

The dataframe contains : the reference ID of each individuals (**Fish_ID**), the histological slide's full name (**slideid**), each cellular type studied in this GLM (**typecell**), the position of the cross section (**position** = **D1**, **D2**, **D3**, **G1**, **G2** or **G3**), the number of times each structure was counted (**hit_points**), and the total number of sampling points for each slide (**nbrtot**).

```{r data35, echo=TRUE, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

Stereo_BB5 <- Stereo_BB1 %>% spread(key = "slideid", value = hit_points) 
Stereo_BB6 <- Stereo_BB5 %>% pivot_longer(cols=2:85, names_to = "slideid", values_to = "hit_points")
Stereo_BB6[is.na(Stereo_BB6)] <- 0
Stereo_BB7 <- Stereo_BB6 %>% mutate(position=((substr(slideid,14,15))))
Stereo_BB9 <- Stereo_BB7 %>% mutate(Fish_ID=((substr(slideid,1,12))))

Stereo_BB8 <- Stereo_BB %>% filter(reading == 'Homogénéité') %>% mutate(position=((substr(slideid,14,15))))

```

## GLM

To test whether there is a difference, or not, between  the 6 sections for one individual, we'll be using a General Linear Model (GLM). The response variable will be the number of times a structure was counted on each slide / the total number of structures counted per slide. This variable will be in percentage, so a binomial GLM will be used.

### og

```{r BBog1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "og"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBog2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBog3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBog4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### po1

```{r BBpo11, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "po1"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBpo12, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBpo13, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBpo14, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### po2

```{r BBpo21, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "po2"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBpo22, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBpo23, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBpo24, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### ldo

```{r BBldo1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "ldo"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBldo2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBldo3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBldo4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### cao

```{r BBcao1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "cao"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBcao2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBcao3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBcao4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### aoA

```{r BBaoA1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "aoA"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBaoA2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBaoA3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBaoA4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### bv

```{r BBbv1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "bv"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBbv2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBbv3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBbv4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### ct

```{r BBct1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "ct"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBct2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBct3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBct4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### E

```{r BBE1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "E"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBE2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBE3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBE4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### gw

```{r BBgw1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "gw"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBgw2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBgw3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBgw4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### Is

```{r BBIs1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "Is"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBIs2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBIs3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBIs4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### L

```{r BBL1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "L"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBL2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBL3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBL4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

### U

```{r BBU1, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm <- Stereo_BB9 %>% mutate(position=substr(slideid,nchar(slideid)-1,nchar(slideid)-0)) %>% 
  group_by(slideid)%>% 
  mutate(nbtot=sum(hit_points))%>%
  ungroup()%>%
  filter(stringr::str_detect(typecell, "U"))

```

Adding a collumn that accounts for the number of times a structure was not accounted for.

```{r BBU2, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat.glm$cas_neg <-dat.glm$nbtot - dat.glm$hit_points

```

GLM model with **logit** link

```{r BBU3, echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

glmcap <- glm(cbind(hit_points, cas_neg) ~ Fish_ID + position , family=binomial(link="logit"), data = dat.glm)

summary(glmcap)

```

A **drop1** is used to summarize the individual deviances of our variables on our model

```{r BBU4, echo=TRUE}

drop1(glmcap, test="Chi")

```

## ACP

There doesn't seem to be differences between the 96 slides. 98.5% of the variation can be explained on 2 axis.

```{r acp4, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

acpmull<-Stereo_BB8%>%group_by(slideid,position,typecell)%>%summarise(n=n())%>%group_by(slideid,position)%>%mutate(tot=sum(n))%>%ungroup()%>%mutate(nperc=n/tot)

datacp<-acpmull%>%transmute(slideid,position,typecell,n=nperc)%>%tidyr::spread(typecell,n,fill=0)
dudi1  <-  dudi.pca(datacp%>%select(-slideid,-position),  scale  =  F, center  =F, scan  =  FALSE,  nf  =  6)

```

```{r acp5, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

fviz_pca_var(dudi1,labelsize=6, repel=T,col.var = "blue",arrowsize = 1) +
  theme_bw()+
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face  = 'bold'))+
  labs(title = "")

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=12, height=6)

```

ACP positions

```{r acp6, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

plot(dudi1$l1[,1:2],col=alpha(c("red","gold2","forestgreen","cyan3","blue","#FF00FFFF")[as.numeric(as.factor(datacp$position))],0.6), pch = 16, cex = 2, cex.lab = 1.5, cex.axis = 1.5, xlab="", ylab= "", theme=theme_bw())
s.class(dudi1$l1,fac=as.factor(datacp$position),add.plot=T,col=c("red","gold2","forestgreen","cyan3","blue","#FF00FFFF"),clabel = 2)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=12, height=6)

```

# III. Stereology results

We concatenate the "Total" reading data from Bay of Biscay and English Channel, as well as concatenate both histological (Stereo_MULL) and macroscopic (MACRO_MULL) data into a single dataframe.

```{r data36}

Stereo_MULL <- bind_rows(Stereo_BB, Stereo_EC) %>% filter(reading == "Total")
Macro_MULL <- bind_rows(Macro_BB, Macro_EC)

# Setting up the date in a dd/mm/yy format
Macro_MULL$Date <- format(as.Date(Macro_MULL$Date, format = "%Y-%m-%d"), "%d/%m/%Y")
mullus1 <- Macro_MULL %>%mutate(Date=((substr(Date,4,10)))) %>% mutate(Fish_ID=((gsub(" ","_",Fish_ID))))

stereo <- Stereo_MULL %>% group_by(typecell, slideid) %>% summarise(hit_points= n())
stereo2 <- stereo %>% spread(key = "typecell", value = hit_points) 
stereo2[is.na(stereo2)] <- 0
stereo3 <- stereo2%>% mutate(Fish_ID=((substr(slideid,1,12))))
stereoR <- select(Stereo_MULL, "slideid", "reading") %>% distinct()
stereo3 <- left_join(stereo3,stereoR, by="slideid")

# Computation of each cellular type count (%) and the aoA% compared to other follicles
stereo4 <- (stereo3[,2:19]*100)/(rowSums(stereo3[,2:19]))
stereo4 <- cbind(stereo4, stereo3$Fish_ID)%>% rename(Fish_ID = `stereo3$Fish_ID`)
stereo4 <- cbind(stereo4, stereo3$reading)%>% rename(reading = `stereo3$reading`)
stereo4 <- stereo4%>% rowwise() %>% mutate(aoA_perc=(100*aoA/(sum(og,po1,po2,ldo,cao,vtg,oih,ho,aoA, na.rm = T))))
stereo4 <- stereo4 %>% rowwise() %>% mutate(ldo_perc=(100*ldo/(sum(og,po1,po2,ldo,cao,vtg,oih,ho,aoA, na.rm = T))))

# Dataframe with Stereological counts and macroscopic parameters
mullus2 <- left_join(stereo4, mullus1, by = c("Fish_ID" = "Fish_ID"))
mullus3 <- mullus2 %>% 
        rename("L_fish" = "Total_fish_length",
               "stock" = "ICES _Division",
               "W_fish" = "Ungutted_fish_weight",
               "parasite" = "Parasite",
               "mat_estim" = "Visual_maturity",
               "age" = "Age",
               "liver" = "Liver_weight",
               "D_gon" = "Droite_gonad_weight",
               "G_gon" = "Gauche_gonad_weight")

# Replace the ICES stat rectangles with the Stock name
mullus3$stock <- str_replace_all(mullus3$stock, c("7d"="English channel","7j"="Bay of Biscay","7g"="Bay of Biscay", "8b;8c" = "Bay of Biscay", "8a" = "Bay of Biscay", "8b" = "Bay of Biscay"))

# We set up a dataframe with just the fish number and the quantified cellular structures for later plots
stereo5 <- (stereo3[,c("og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","aoA","aoB")]*100)/(rowSums(stereo3[,c("og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","aoA","aoB")]))
stereo5 <- cbind(stereo5, stereo3$Fish_ID)
colnames(stereo5)[colnames(stereo5) == "stereo3$Fish_ID"] ="Fish_ID"

# Setting up a function to summarize the mean counts of cellular structures
data_summary <- function(data, varname, groupnames){
  require(plyr)
  summary_func <- function(x, col){
    c(mean = mean(x[[col]], na.rm=TRUE),
      sd = sd(x[[col]], na.rm=TRUE))
  }
  data_sum<-ddply(data, groupnames, .fun=summary_func,
                  varname)
  data_sum <- plyr::rename(data_sum, c("mean" = varname))
 return(data_sum)
}

```

List of mesured parameters :

-**L_fish**: total lengh of fish (cm)      
-**W_fish**: ungutted weight of fish (g)   
-**parasite**: presence of parasites (Y/N)
-**mat_estim**: visually estimated maturity phase
-**age**: fish age (year)                     
-**liver**: Liver weight (g)                
-**D_gon**: Weight of right ovary (g)  
-**G_gon**: weight of left ovary (g)

Computation of the last parameters

- **GSI**: ratio between the ovaries' total weight and the fish's ungutted weight (gonado-somatic index)
- **HSI**: ratio between the liver's weight and the fish's ungutted weight (hepato-somatic index)

```{r data37, echo= TRUE}

# Make sure numerical data is correctly labelled as such
mullus3$liver <- as.numeric(mullus3$liver)
mullus3$age <- as.numeric(mullus3$age)
mullus3$D_gon <- as.numeric(mullus3$D_gon)
mullus3$G_gon <- as.numeric(mullus3$G_gon)
mullus3$Fish_N <- as.character(mullus3$Fish_N) 

mullus4 <- mullus3%>%select(Fish_ID, Date, stock,L_fish, W_fish, mat_estim, og,po1,po2,ldo,cao,vtg,oih,ho,POF,aoA,aoB,L,gw,ct,bv,Is,U,E, aoA_perc,ldo_perc,age, liver, D_gon,G_gon) %>% rowwise() %>% mutate(GSI=(sum(D_gon,G_gon, na.rm = T)/W_fish*100)) %>% mutate(HSI=(liver/W_fish*100))

```

## Manual determination of maturity phases

Following the ICES and Brown-Peterson et al. (2011) definitions, the stereological counts were used to classify each individual into a maturity phase. For this process, only the phases A, B, C and E were established, with all remaining slides being automatically put into the D (Regressing/Regenerating) phase.

```{r data38}

MullusH<-mullus4
MullusH$matphase<-"unknown"

```

### Immature - A

Individuals classified into the Immature phase have the following histological criteria:

- a count of **og**, **po1**, **po2** or **ldo** that is not null
- absence of **POF**, **aoB**, **cao**, **vtg**, **oih** and **ho**
- a count of **aoA** that is less than 50% of germinal cells counted

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

MullusH$matphase[(MullusH$og>0 | MullusH$po1>0 | MullusH$po2>0 | MullusH$ldo>0) & MullusH$POF==0 & MullusH$aoB==0 & MullusH$cao==0 & MullusH$vtg==0 & MullusH$oih==0 & MullusH$ho==0 & MullusH$aoA_perc<50]<-"A"

```

### Developping - B

Individuals classified into the Developping phase have the following histological criteria:

- presence of either **cao** or **vtg**
- a count of **aoA** that is less than 50% of germinal cells counted
- absence of **POF**, **aoB**,  **oih** and **ho**

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

MullusH$matphase[(MullusH$cao>0 | MullusH$vtg>0) & MullusH$POF==0 & MullusH$aoB==0 & MullusH$oih==0 & MullusH$ho==0 & MullusH$aoA_perc<50] <-"B"

```

### Spawning - C

Individuals classified into the Spawning phase have the following histological criteria:

- presence of **POF**
- presence of either **vtg**, **oih**, **ho**,  or **aoB**
- a count of **aoA** that is less than 50% of germinal cells counted

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

MullusH$matphase[(MullusH$vtg>0 | MullusH$oih>0 | MullusH$ho>0 | MullusH$aoB>0) & MullusH$POF>0 & MullusH$aoA_perc<50]<-"Ca"

```

- absence of **POF** and of **aoB**
- presence of either **oih** or **ho**
- a count of **aoA** that is less than 50% of germinal cells counted

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

MullusH$matphase[(MullusH$oih>0 | MullusH$ho>0) & MullusH$POF==0 & MullusH$aoA_perc<=50 & MullusH$aoA_perc<50]<-"Cb"

```

### Omitted Spawning - E

Individuals classified into the Omitted Spawning phase have the following histological criteria:

- a count of **aoA** that is more or equal to 50% of germinal cells counted
- absence of **POF**

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

MullusH$matphase[MullusH$POF==0 & MullusH$aoA_perc>=50 ]<-"E"

```

### Regressing / Regenerating - D

Individuals classified into the Regressing/Regenerating phase are those that have not been classified into the other phases. 

```{r}

mullus_D <- MullusH[grepl("unknown", MullusH$matphase),]
mullus_D$matphase <- "D"

```

Combining the histologically determined maturity phases with the rest of the data.

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

stadeD<-mullus_D%>%transmute(Fish_ID,matphase)
stadeABCE<-MullusH%>%transmute(Fish_ID,matphase)%>%filter(matphase%in%c("A","B","Ca","Cb","D", "E"))
stadeAll<-rbind(stadeD,stadeABCE)

macroHname<-c("mat_estim","Vis_Stereo_CS","Date","stock","reading","og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","L","aoA","aoB","gw","ct","bv","Is","E","U","aoA_perc","ldo_perc","Fish_ID","L_fish","W_fish","age", "parasite","liver","D_gon","G_gon","GSI","HSI")
tabmacro <-full_join(stadeAll,mullus4[,names(mullus4)%in%macroHname])

```

plot 31 : Maturity phase (%) of individuals per month

```{r plot31}

tabmacro$Date <- factor(tabmacro$Date, levels = c("11/2020","02/2021","03/2021","04/2021","05/2021","06/2021","07/2021","08/2021","09/2021","10/2021","11/2021","12/2021","01/2022","02/2022","08/2022"))

ggplot(tabmacro,aes(x=Date,y=L_fish, color = matphase, groupe=stock))+
  geom_point(aes(shape=stock),width = 0.2, height = 0.2, position=position_dodge(width=0.6), size=2)+ 
  theme_bw()+
   scale_color_manual(name = "Maturity phase", values=c('#FF0000FF', 'orange', 'springgreen3', 'green4', '#0092FFFF', '#4900FFFF', 'black'))+
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Stock", values=c(24, 3))+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35))+
  labs(x = "", y = "Length (cm)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 11), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title=element_text(size=12,face="bold"),
        legend.text=element_text(size=11),
        legend.title=element_text(size=12))

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=7, height=5)

```

## Confusion matrix

Table 1 : Table crossing the number of individuals classified visually with those same individuals classified with the stereological method

```{r table1}

table(tabmacro$matphase,tabmacro$mat_estim) 

```

## Maturity ogive, L50 and A50 : Bay of Biscay

```{r data39, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

dat_ogiveBB <- tabmacro %>% filter(stock == "Bay of Biscay")
dat_ogiveBB$L_fish<-as.numeric(as.character(dat_ogiveBB$L_fish))

dat_ogiveBB <-dat_ogiveBB[!grepl("E", dat_ogiveBB$matphase),]
dat_ogiveBB <-dat_ogiveBB[!grepl("F", dat_ogiveBB$mat_estim),]

```

plot 32 : Maturity ogive and L50 determined with visually estimated maturity

```{r plot32}

gonad_mat1<-gonad_mature(dat_ogiveBB,varNames=c("L_fish","mat_estim"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B","C","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat1)
plot(gonad_mat1)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 33 : Maturity ogive and A50 determined with visually estimated maturity

```{r plot33}

gonad_mat2<-gonad_mature(dat_ogiveBB,varNames=c("age","mat_estim"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B","C","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat2)
plot(gonad_mat2)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 34 : Maturity ogive and L50 determined with stereologically estimated maturity

```{r plot34}

gonad_mat3<-gonad_mature(dat_ogiveBB,varNames=c("L_fish","matphase"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B","Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat3)
plot(gonad_mat3)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 35 : Maturity ogive and A50 determined with stereologically estimated maturity

```{r plot35}

gonad_mat4<-gonad_mature(dat_ogiveBB,varNames=c("age","matphase"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B","Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat4)
plot(gonad_mat4)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

```{r data40, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

tabhistoBB <- tabmacro %>% filter(stock == "Bay of Biscay") %>% select(Fish_ID,matphase,Date) 
tabhistoBB <- left_join(tabhistoBB, stereo5, by = c("Fish_ID" = "Fish_ID"))

GLCname<-c("og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","aoA","aoB")
tabhistoBBlong<-gather(tabhistoBB,var,value,which(names(tabhistoBB)%in%c(GLCname)))

tabhistoBBGCS <- data_summary(tabhistoBBlong, varname="value", groupnames=c("var","Date"))
tabhistoBBGCS$Date <- factor(tabhistoBBGCS$Date, levels = c("11/2020","05/2021","06/2021","07/2021","09/2021","10/2021","11/2021","02/2022"))

```

plot 36 : Mean Germline cell (%) of individuals per month

```{r plot36}

tabhistoBBGCS %>% mutate(var = fct_relevel(var,"og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","aoA","aoB","L")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Date, y=value, group=var, fill=var))+
  theme_bw()+
  labs(x = "", y = "Mean Germline cell %") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 11), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title=element_text(size=12,face="bold"),
        legend.text=element_text(size=11),
        legend.title=element_text(size=12))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity")+
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Germline cells",values=c("lightgoldenrod1","yellow","orange","brown","gray0","lightpink1","deeppink2","darkslategray1","cyan3","gray52","gray88"))

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=7, height=5)

```

## Maturity ogive, L50 and A50 : English channel

```{r data41, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

dat_ogiveEC <- tabmacro %>% filter(stock == "English channel")
dat_ogiveEC$L_fish<-as.numeric(as.character(dat_ogiveEC$L_fish))

dat_ogiveEC <-dat_ogiveEC[!grepl("F", dat_ogiveEC$mat_estim),]

```

plot 37 : Maturity ogive and L50 determined with visually estimated maturity

```{r plot37}

gonad_mat5<-gonad_mature(dat_ogiveEC,varNames=c("L_fish","mat_estim"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat5)
plot(gonad_mat5)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 38 : Maturity ogive and A50 determined with visually estimated maturity

```{r plot38}

gonad_mat6<-gonad_mature(dat_ogiveEC,varNames=c("age","mat_estim"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat6)
plot(gonad_mat6)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 39 : Maturity ogive and L50 determined with stereologically estimated maturity

```{r plot39}

gonad_mat7<-gonad_mature(dat_ogiveEC,varNames=c("L_fish","matphase"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B","Ca","Cb"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat7)
plot(gonad_mat7)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 40 : Maturity ogive and A50 determined with stereologically estimated maturity

```{r plot40}

gonad_mat8<-gonad_mature(dat_ogiveEC,varNames=c("age","matphase"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B","Ca","Cb"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat8)
plot(gonad_mat8)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

```{r data42, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

tabhistoEC <- tabmacro %>% filter(stock == "English channel") %>% select(Fish_ID,matphase,Date) 
tabhistoEC <- left_join(tabhistoEC, stereo5, by = c("Fish_ID" = "Fish_ID"))

GLCname<-c("og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","aoA","aoB")
tabhistoEClong<-gather(tabhistoEC,var,value,which(names(tabhistoEC)%in%c(GLCname)))

tabhistoECGCS <- data_summary(tabhistoEClong, varname="value", groupnames=c("var","Date"))
tabhistoECGCS$Date <- factor(tabhistoECGCS$Date, levels = c("11/2020","02/2021","03/2021","04/2021","05/2021","08/2021","09/2021","10/2021","11/2021","12/2021","01/2022","02/2022","08/2022"))

```

plot 41 : Mean Germline cell (%) of individuals per month

```{r plot41}

tabhistoECGCS %>% mutate(var = fct_relevel(var,"og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","aoA","aoB","L")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=Date, y=value, group=var, fill=var))+
  theme_bw()+
  labs(x = "", y = "Mean Germline cell %") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 11), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title=element_text(size=12,face="bold"),
        legend.text=element_text(size=11),
        legend.title=element_text(size=12))+
  geom_bar(stat="identity")+
  scale_fill_manual(name = "Germline cells",values=c("lightgoldenrod1","yellow","orange","brown","gray0","lightpink1","deeppink2","darkslategray1","cyan3","gray52","gray88"))

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=7, height=5)

```

# IV. Hierarchical clustering : Unsupervised learning

Due to the natural oogenesis cycle of the species, we suspect that individuals in D were classified under A. We want to search for a signal, amongst the cellular structures quantified, that could help finding the individuals classified under the wrong maturity phase.
We consider all individuals classified under A during the spawning period (classified under reading : L50) to truly be immatures (A). 
 
Here we use only data from individuals classified under A (through stereology), but from all sampling periods and we select only germline cells.

```{r data43}

tabhisto <- tabmacro %>% select(Fish_ID,matphase,Date,stock)
tabhisto <- left_join(tabhisto, stereo5, by = c("Fish_ID" = "Fish_ID"))
tabmacro_A <- tabhisto %>% filter(grepl('A', matphase))

tabmacro_A_BB <- tabmacro_A %>% filter(stock=="Bay of Biscay")
tabmacro_A_EC <- tabmacro_A %>% filter(stock=="English channel")

```

We'll be using the Agglomerative approach (each observation is a distinct cluster, clusters are merges together until a stopping criterion is satisfied), with an euclidean (default) distance (continuous numerical values).

We select only germline cells.

## Bay of Biscay

```{r data44, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

clustAD_BB<-tabmacro_A_BB%>%select(-matphase,-Date)%>%na.omit()%>%ungroup()

```

We cut the tree in 2 because we're looking for 2 potential groups (A and D)

```{r nonsup1, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

htree<-hclust(dist(clustAD_BB),method="ward.D2")
plot(htree, cex.lab = 1.8, cex.axis = 1.5,cex = 0.5)
rect.hclust(htree,2)

```

Confusion matrix

```{r nonsup2, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

newgp<-cutree(htree,2)
table(newgp)

```

Plot 42 : Summary of Germline cells classified into 2 groups

```{r plot42, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

clustAD_BBlong<-clustAD_BB%>%mutate(newgp=newgp)%>%
  pivot_longer(og:aoB)

ggplot(clustAD_BBlong,aes(x=as.factor(newgp),y=value))+geom_jitter(width = 0.1, height = 0.1)+
  facet_wrap(~name,scale="free")

```

ACP

```{r data45, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

clustAD_BB <- clustAD_BB%>%mutate(newgp=newgp)

# Rename the groups
clustAD_BB <- clustAD_BB  %>% mutate(newgp = str_replace(newgp, "2", "A"))
clustAD_BB <- clustAD_BB  %>% mutate(newgp = str_replace(newgp, "1", "pfB"))

```

```{r acp7, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

dudi1  <-  dudi.pca(clustAD_BB%>%select(-newgp,-Fish_ID,-stock),  scale  =  T, center  =T, scan  =  FALSE,  nf  =  6)
fviz_eig(dudi1)

```

```{r acp8, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

fviz_pca_biplot(dudi1, col.ind = as.factor(clustAD_BB$newgp), palette = c(), 
                addEllipses = TRUE, label = "var", legend.title = "Maturity phase",
                col.var = "blue",arrowsize = 1, repel = TRUE, labelsize=6)+
  theme_bw()+
  ggtitle("")+
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face  = 'bold'),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.position = c(0.8, 0.85),
    legend.background = element_rect(size=0.5, linetype="solid", colour ="black"))

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=8, height=5)

```

### Rectified maturity phase

```{r data46, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

AD_BB <- clustAD_BB %>% select('Fish_ID','newgp')
Tab_fin_BB <- left_join(tabmacro, AD_BB ,by = c("Fish_ID" = "Fish_ID")) %>% filter(stock=="Bay of Biscay")
Tab_fin_BB <- Tab_fin_BB %>% mutate(newgp = coalesce(newgp,matphase))

Tab_fin_BB$newgp <- factor(Tab_fin_BB$newgp, levels = c("A","pfB","B","Ca","Cb","D","E"))
Tab_fin_BB$Date <- factor(Tab_fin_BB$Date, levels = c("11/2020","02/2021","03/2021","04/2021","05/2021","06/2021","07/2021","08/2021","09/2021","10/2021","11/2021","12/2021","01/2022","02/2022","08/2022"))

```

Confusion matrix

Table 2 : Table crossing the number of individuals classified Stereologically with those same individuals re-classified with the stereological method

```{r table2}

table(Tab_fin_BB$matphase,Tab_fin_BB$newgp) 

```

Maturity Ogive and L50

```{r data47, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

dat_ogive <- Tab_fin_BB
dat_ogive$L_fish<-as.numeric(as.character(dat_ogive$L_fish))

dat_ogive <-dat_ogive[!grepl("E", dat_ogive$matphase),]

dat_ogivepfB <-dat_ogive[!grepl("pfB", dat_ogive$newgp),]
dat_ogivepfB <-dat_ogivepfB[!grepl("E", dat_ogivepfB$newgp),]

```

plot 43 : Maturity ogive and L50 determined with reviewed stereologically estimated maturity WITH pfB

```{r plot43}

gonad_mat9<-gonad_mature(dat_ogive,varNames=c("L_fish","newgp"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B",'pfB',"Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat9)
plot(gonad_mat9)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 44 : Maturity ogive and L50 determined with reviewed stereologically estimated maturity WITHOUT pfB

```{r plot44}

gonad_mat10<-gonad_mature(dat_ogivepfB,varNames=c("L_fish","newgp"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B","Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat10)
plot(gonad_mat10)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 45 : Maturity ogive and A50 determined with reviewed stereologically estimated maturity WITH pfB

```{r plot45}

gonad_mat11<-gonad_mature(dat_ogive,varNames=c("age","newgp"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B",'pfB',"Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat11)
plot(gonad_mat11)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 46 : Maturity ogive and A50 determined with reviewed stereologically estimated maturity WITHOUT pfB

```{r plot46}

gonad_mat12<-gonad_mature(dat_ogivepfB,varNames=c("age","newgp"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B","Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat12)
plot(gonad_mat12)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

## English Channel

```{r data47, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

clustAD_EC<-tabmacro_A_EC%>%select(-matphase,-Date)%>%na.omit()%>%ungroup()

```

We cut the tree in 2 because we're looking for 2 potential groups (A and D)

```{r nonsup3, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

htree<-hclust(dist(clustAD_EC),method="ward.D2")
plot(htree, cex.lab = 1.8, cex.axis = 1.5,cex = 0.5)
rect.hclust(htree,3)

```

Confusion matrix

```{r nonsup4, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

newgp<-cutree(htree,3)
table(newgp)

```

Plot 47 : Summary of Germline cells classified into 2 groups

```{r plot47, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

clustAD_EClong<-clustAD_EC%>%mutate(newgp=newgp)%>%
  pivot_longer(og:aoB)

ggplot(clustAD_EClong,aes(x=as.factor(newgp),y=value))+geom_jitter(width = 0.1, height = 0.1)+
  facet_wrap(~name,scale="free")

```

ACP

```{r data48, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

clustAD_EC <- clustAD_EC%>%mutate(newgp=newgp)

# Rename the groups
clustAD_EC <- clustAD_EC  %>% mutate(newgp = str_replace(newgp, "1", "A"))
clustAD_EC <- clustAD_EC  %>% mutate(newgp = str_replace(newgp, "2", "pfB"))
clustAD_EC <- clustAD_EC  %>% mutate(newgp = str_replace(newgp, "3", "A"))

```

```{r acp9, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

dudi1  <-  dudi.pca(clustAD_EC%>%select(-newgp,-Fish_ID,-stock),  scale  =  T, center  =T, scan  =  FALSE,  nf  =  6)
fviz_eig(dudi1)

```

```{r acp10, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

fviz_pca_biplot(dudi1, col.ind = as.factor(clustAD_EC$newgp), palette = c(), 
                addEllipses = TRUE, label = "var", legend.title = "Maturity phase",
                col.var = "blue",arrowsize = 1, repel = TRUE, labelsize=6)+
  theme_bw()+
  ggtitle("")+
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face  = 'bold'),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.position = c(0.15, 0.85),
    legend.background = element_rect(size=0.5, linetype="solid", colour ="black"))

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=8, height=5)

```

### Rectified maturity phase

```{r data49, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

AD_EC <- clustAD_EC %>% select('Fish_ID','newgp')
Tab_fin_EC <- left_join(tabmacro, AD_EC ,by = c("Fish_ID" = "Fish_ID")) %>% filter(stock=="English channel")
Tab_fin_EC <- Tab_fin_EC %>% mutate(newgp = coalesce(newgp,matphase))

Tab_fin_EC$newgp <- factor(Tab_fin_EC$newgp, levels = c("A","pfB","B","Ca","Cb","D","E"))
Tab_fin_EC$Date <- factor(Tab_fin_EC$Date, levels = c("11/2020","02/2021","03/2021","04/2021","05/2021","06/2021","07/2021","08/2021","09/2021","10/2021","11/2021","12/2021","01/2022","02/2022","08/2022"))

```

Confusion matrix

Table 3 : Table crossing the number of individuals classified Stereologically with those same individuals re-classified with the stereological method

```{r table3}

table(Tab_fin_EC$matphase,Tab_fin_EC$newgp) 

```

Maturity Ogive and L50

```{r data50, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

dat_ogive <- Tab_fin_EC
dat_ogive$L_fish<-as.numeric(as.character(dat_ogive$L_fish))

dat_ogive <-dat_ogive[!grepl("E", dat_ogive$matphase),]

dat_ogivepfB <-dat_ogive[!grepl("pfB", dat_ogive$newgp),]
dat_ogivepfB <-dat_ogivepfB[!grepl("E", dat_ogivepfB$newgp),]

```

plot 48 : Maturity ogive and L50 determined with reviewed stereologically estimated maturity WITH pfB

```{r plot48}

gonad_mat13<-gonad_mature(dat_ogive,varNames=c("L_fish","newgp"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B",'pfB',"Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat13)
plot(gonad_mat13)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 44 : Maturity ogive and L50 determined with reviewed stereologically estimated maturity WITHOUT pfB

```{r plot44}

gonad_mat14<-gonad_mature(dat_ogivepfB,varNames=c("L_fish","newgp"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B","Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat14)
plot(gonad_mat14)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 49 : Maturity ogive and A50 determined with reviewed stereologically estimated maturity WITH pfB

```{r plot49}

gonad_mat15<-gonad_mature(dat_ogive,varNames=c("age","newgp"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B",'pfB',"Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat15)
plot(gonad_mat15)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 50 : Maturity ogive and A50 determined with reviewed stereologically estimated maturity WITHOUT pfB

```{r plot50}

gonad_mat16<-gonad_mature(dat_ogivepfB,varNames=c("age","newgp"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B","Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat16)
plot(gonad_mat16)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

## All data

```{r data51, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

clustAD<-tabmacro_A%>%select(-matphase,-Date)%>%na.omit()%>%ungroup()

```

We cut the tree in 2 because we're looking for 2 potential groups (A and D)

```{r nonsup5, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

htree<-hclust(dist(clustAD),method="ward.D2")
plot(htree, cex.lab = 1.8, cex.axis = 1.5,cex = 0.5)
rect.hclust(htree,3)

```

Confusion matrix

```{r nonsup6, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

newgp<-cutree(htree,3)
table(newgp)

```

Plot 51 : Summary of Germline cells classified into 2 groups

```{r plot51, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

clustADlong<-clustAD%>%mutate(newgp=newgp)%>%
  pivot_longer(og:aoB)

ggplot(clustADlong,aes(x=as.factor(newgp),y=value))+geom_jitter(width = 0.1, height = 0.1)+
  facet_wrap(~name,scale="free")

```

ACP

```{r data52, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

clustAD <- clustAD%>%mutate(newgp=newgp)

# Rename the groups
clustAD <- clustAD  %>% mutate(newgp = str_replace(newgp, "1", "A"))
clustAD <- clustAD  %>% mutate(newgp = str_replace(newgp, "2", "pfB"))
clustAD <- clustAD  %>% mutate(newgp = str_replace(newgp, "3", "A"))

```

```{r acp11, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

dudi1  <-  dudi.pca(clustAD%>%select(-newgp,-Fish_ID,-stock),  scale  =  T, center  =T, scan  =  FALSE,  nf  =  6)
fviz_eig(dudi1)

```

```{r acp12, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

fviz_pca_biplot(dudi1, col.ind = as.factor(clustAD$newgp), palette = c(), 
                addEllipses = TRUE, label = "var", legend.title = "Maturity phase",
                col.var = "blue",arrowsize = 1, repel = TRUE, labelsize=6)+
  theme_bw()+
  ggtitle("")+
  theme(
    axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 13, face  = 'bold'),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 13),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.position = c(0.15, 0.8),
    legend.background = element_rect(size=0.5, linetype="solid", colour ="black"))

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=8, height=5)

```

### Rectified maturity phase

```{r data53, echo=TRUE, fig.height=9, fig.width=18, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

AD <- clustAD %>% select('Fish_ID','newgp')
Tab_fin <- left_join(tabmacro, AD, by = c("Fish_ID" = "Fish_ID"))
Tab_fin <- Tab_fin %>% mutate(newgp = coalesce(newgp,matphase))

Tab_fin$newgp <- factor(Tab_fin$newgp, levels = c("A","pfB","B","Ca","Cb","D","E"))
Tab_fin$Date <- factor(Tab_fin$Date, levels = c("11/2020","02/2021","03/2021","04/2021","05/2021","06/2021","07/2021","08/2021","09/2021","10/2021","11/2021","12/2021","01/2022","02/2022","08/2022"))

```

Confusion matrix

Table 4 : Table crossing the number of individuals classified Stereologically with those same individuals re-classified with the stereological method

```{r table4}

table(Tab_fin$matphase,Tab_fin$newgp) 

```

Maturity Ogive and L50

```{r data54, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

dat_ogive <- Tab_fin
dat_ogive$L_fish<-as.numeric(as.character(dat_ogive$L_fish))

dat_ogive <-dat_ogive[!grepl("E", dat_ogive$matphase),]

dat_ogivepfB <-dat_ogive[!grepl("pfB", dat_ogive$newgp),]
dat_ogivepfB <-dat_ogivepfB[!grepl("E", dat_ogivepfB$newgp),]

```

plot 52 : Maturity ogive and L50 determined with reviewed stereologically estimated maturity WITH pfB

```{r plot52}

gonad_mat17<-gonad_mature(dat_ogive,varNames=c("L_fish","newgp"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B",'pfB',"Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat17)
plot(gonad_mat17)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 53 : Maturity ogive and L50 determined with reviewed stereologically estimated maturity WITHOUT pfB

```{r plot53}

gonad_mat18<-gonad_mature(dat_ogivepfB,varNames=c("L_fish","newgp"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B","Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat18)
plot(gonad_mat18)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 54 : Maturity ogive and A50 determined with reviewed stereologically estimated maturity WITH pfB

```{r plot54}

gonad_mat19<-gonad_mature(dat_ogive,varNames=c("age","newgp"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B",'pfB',"Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat19)
plot(gonad_mat19)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 55 : Maturity ogive and A50 determined with reviewed stereologically estimated maturity WITHOUT pfB

```{r plot55}

gonad_mat20<-gonad_mature(dat_ogivepfB,varNames=c("age","newgp"),inmName=c("A"),
			matName=c("B","Ca","Cb","D"),method="fq",niter=800)
print(gonad_mat20)
plot(gonad_mat20)

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=5)

```

plot 56 : Maturity phase (%) of individuals of different age class

```{r plot56}

ggplot(Tab_fin,aes(x=Date,y=L_fish, color = newgp, groupe=stock))+
  geom_point(aes(shape=stock),width = 0.2, height = 0.2, position='jitter', size = 2)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 11), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title=element_text(size=12,face="bold"),
        legend.text=element_text(size=11),
        legend.title=element_text(size=12),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())+
   scale_color_manual(name = "Stereology", values=c('#FF0000FF','purple','orange', 'springgreen3', 'green4', '#0092FFFF', 'black'))+
  scale_shape_manual(name = "Stock", values=c(24, 3))+
  scale_y_continuous(breaks=c(0,5,10,15,20,25,30,35))+
  ylab("Length (cm)")+xlab("")


graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=9, height=4)

```

Plot 57: Boxplots of the 20 different cellular structures for all 5 maturity phases (determined through stereology)

```{r plot57, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

histoname<-c("og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","L","aoA","aoB","gw","ct","bv","Is","E","U")

Tab_finlong<-gather(Tab_fin,var,value,which(names(Tab_fin)%in%c(histoname)))
ggplot(Tab_finlong,aes(x=var,y=value,color = stock, groupe=stock))+
  geom_boxplot(position=position_dodge(width=0.9))+
  geom_point(alpha=.3,position=position_dodge(width=0.9))+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("navy", "darkred"), name = "")+
		facet_wrap(~newgp)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 11), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title=element_text(size=12,face="bold"),
        legend.text=element_text(size=11),
        legend.title=element_text(size=12))+
    aes(x = factor(var, level = c("og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","L","aoA","aoB","gw","ct","bv","Is","E","U")))+
		xlab("Cellular structures")+ylab("Percentage count")+
  scale_y_continuous(labels=function(x) paste0(x,"%"))

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=18, height=10)

```

Plot 58: Boxplots of the 20 different cellular structures for all 5 maturity phases (determined through stereology) for individuals from the Bay of Biscay stock

```{r plot58, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

histoname<-c("og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","L","aoA","aoB","gw","ct","bv","Is","E","U")

Tab_finlong<-gather(Tab_fin,var,value,which(names(Tab_fin)%in%c(histoname)))

ggplot(Tab_finlong%>%filter(stock=="Bay of Biscay"),aes(x=var,y=value))+
  geom_boxplot(position=position_dodge())+
  geom_point(alpha=.3, color="navy")+
		facet_wrap(~newgp)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 11), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title=element_text(size=12,face="bold"),
        legend.text=element_text(size=11),
        legend.title=element_text(size=12))+
    aes(x = factor(var, level = c("og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","L","aoA","aoB","gw","ct","bv","Is","E","U")))+
		xlab("Cellular structures")+ylab("Percentage count")+
  scale_y_continuous(labels=function(x) paste0(x,"%"))

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=11, height=7)

```

Plot 59: Boxplots of the 20 different cellular structures for all 5 maturity phases (determined through stereology) for individuals from the Bay of Biscay stock

```{r plot59, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

histoname<-c("og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","L","aoA","aoB","gw","ct","bv","Is","E","U")

Tab_finlong<-gather(Tab_fin,var,value,which(names(Tab_fin)%in%c(histoname)))

ggplot(Tab_finlong%>%filter(stock=="English channel"),aes(x=var,y=value))+
  geom_boxplot(position=position_dodge())+
  geom_point(alpha=.3, color="darkred")+
		facet_wrap(~newgp)+
  theme_bw()+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 50, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 11), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title=element_text(size=12,face="bold"),
        legend.text=element_text(size=11),
        legend.title=element_text(size=12))+
    aes(x = factor(var, level = c("og","po1","po2","ldo","cao","vtg","oih","ho","POF","L","aoA","aoB","gw","ct","bv","Is","E","U")))+
		xlab("Cellular structures")+ylab("Percentage count")+
  scale_y_continuous(labels=function(x) paste0(x,"%"))

#graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=11, height=7)

```

### GSI

```{r data55}

Tab_finGSI <-Tab_fin[Tab_fin$GSI != 0, ]
Tab_finHSI <-Tab_fin[Tab_fin$HSI != 0, ] %>% na.omit()

```

plot 60 : Barplot of GSI for different phases for both stocks

```{r plot60}

ggplot(Tab_finGSI, aes(x=newgp, y=GSI,color = stock, groupe=stock)) +
  theme_bw()+
  geom_boxplot(position=position_dodge(width=0.8)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 2, width = 0.1, height = 0,position=position_dodge(width=0.8)) +
  stat_summary(fun = mean, shape = 13, size = 1, colour = "black",position=position_dodge(width=0.8))+
  scale_color_manual(values = c("navy", "darkred"), name = "")+
  xlab("Maturity phase")+ylab("GSI (%)")+
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 11), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.title=element_text(size=12,face="bold"),
        legend.text=element_text(size=11),
        legend.title=element_text(size=12))

graph2ppt(file="ggplot_plot.pptx", width=6, height=4)

```
